body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
closes #1315

example of failing longrun build before this PR: https://buildkite.com/clima/climacoupler-longruns/builds/867

longruns after this PR (note many still fail, for new reasons): https://buildkite.com/clima/climacoupler-longruns/builds/877

After this PR, the problems from all failing runs should be addressed.

## Content
- [x] `Slabplanet_aqua: nocouple` - removed run; at this point in time I don't think running component models without coupling is very useful to us. We can always add this back if we need information about an uncoupled run.
- [x] `ClimaAtmos standalone target` - fixed path to config file, unified config file with ClimaAtmos equivalent
- [x] `TARGET IDEALIZED: new target aqua - fixed ocean T, nocouple, atmos flux calc` - decreased `t_end` 120 -> 90 days
- [x] `TARGET IDEALIZED: new target slab - evolving slab ocean T, bucket` - removed `vert_diff` option, which aligns this more closely with the fixed ocean equivalent
- [x] `MPI AMIP FINE: new target amip` - moved to run on GPU; it should be fast enough for the time limit now
- [x] `MPI AMIP FINE: new target amip: topo` - removed since we run the same setup on GPU
- [x] `MPI AMIP FINE: new target amip: topo + diagedmf` - removed since we run the same setup on GPU
- [x] `GPU AMIP FINE: new target amip: topo` - increased memory limit, changed to run on clima
- [x] `GPU AMIP SUPERFINE: dyamond target` - changed atmos/coupler diagnostics merging to handle case where coupler list is empty; tested constructing ClimaAtmosSimulation works now
- [x] all runs - don't softfail


<!---
Review checklist

I have:
- followed the codebase contribution guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/
- followed the style guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/
- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

----
- [ ] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: fix up longruns
